reviews.comment:
Buena atención como en todas sus estaciones. Le saca puntos el precio dolarizado del serviclub, no tanto las comidas que preparan en estos lugares, sino por las bebidas, galletitas, chocolates, etc.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, as at all their stations. The dollar-based prices at the service club are a drawback, not so much for the food they prepare there, but for the drinks, cookies, chocolates, etc.

reviews.comment:
El lugar le falta árboles en el sector de los niños,está muy fuerte el sol.
Los chicos del surtidor amables
Los baños limpios
Y había higiénico y jabón 👏
Está bien surtido y ahí lugar para comer adentro.
Pero eran 6 en la caja y solo priorizaban a quien compraba en la caja 25 minutos esperando en la mesa.
Así que cargue combustible ,aceite y me fui

(Translated by Google)
The place needs more trees in the children's area, and the sun is very strong.
The guys at the pump were friendly.
The restrooms were clean.
And there was toilet paper and soap 👏
It's well-stocked and there's a place to eat inside.

But there were six people at the register and they only prioritized those who were paying at the register, so I waited 25 minutes at the table.

So I filled up with gas and oil and left.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNMGI3V25nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos en el ACA, la estacion de combustible muy bien atendida. Baños impecables y el bar muy bueno, todo fresco y rico. Paren ahí

(Translated by Google)
We always stop at ACA, the gas station is very well-staffed. The bathrooms are spotless, and the bar is very good, with everything fresh and delicious. Stop there.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, como socio del ACA pude aprovechar el lugar para pasar unas horas y continuar con mi viaje. Los baños son muy limpios, cuenta con baño para discapacitados.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. As an ACA member, I was able to spend a few hours there before continuing my trip. The bathrooms are very clean and there's a handicapped-accessible bathroom.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNNUxld3Z3RRAB
